text: Ben sat in the kitchen at noon. He picked up an apple, ate all of it, and put the core in the bin.
Ben sat in the kitchen at noon. He picked up an apple, ate all of it, and put the core in the bin. There was no other food in the house.
A kettle sat on the stove with water in it. The water was boiling hard, and steam rose from the spout.
A grey stone lay at the bottom of a cold mountain stream. It had lain there, unmoving, for many years.
